Query.SQL: ( SELECT 'Cases' AS "TRANSFER_TYPE" , C.CASE_NUMBER AS "TRANSFER_NUMBER" , C.ADMIN_CRT_CODE AS "TRANSFER_SENDING_COURT_CODE" , SCT.NAME AS "TRANSFER_SENDING_COURT_NAME" , C.TRANS_CRT_CODE AS "TRANSFER_RECEIVING_COURT_CODE" , RCT.NAME AS "TRANSFER_RECEIVING_COURT_NAME" FROM CASES C, COURTS SCT, COURTS RCT WHERE C.TRANSFER_STATUS = '1' AND C.DATE_OF_TRANSFER = TO_DATE(${param.failedDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND SCT.CODE = C.ADMIN_CRT_CODE AND RCT.CODE = C.TRANS_CRT_CODE ) UNION ( SELECT 'Warrants' AS "TRANSFER_TYPE" , W.WARRANT_NUMBER AS "TRANSFER_NUMBER" , W.CURRENTLY_OWNED_BY AS "TRANSFER_SENDING_COURT_CODE" , SCT.NAME AS "TRANSFER_SENDING_COURT_NAME" , W.EXECUTED_BY AS "TRANSFER_RECEIVING_COURT_CODE" , RCT.NAME AS "TRANSFER_RECEIVING_COURT_NAME" FROM WARRANTS W, COURTS SCT, COURTS RCT WHERE W.TO_TRANSFER = '1' AND W.WARRANT_ISSUE_DATE = TO_DATE(${param.failedDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND SCT.CODE = W.CURRENTLY_OWNED_BY AND RCT.CODE = W.EXECUTED_BY ) UNION ( SELECT 'Warrant Returns' AS "TRANSFER_TYPE" , W.WARRANT_NUMBER AS "TRANSFER_NUMBER" , W.ISSUED_BY AS "TRANSFER_SENDING_COURT_CODE" , SCT.NAME AS "TRANSFER_SENDING_COURT_NAME" , WR.ADMIN_COURT_CODE AS "TRANSFER_RECEIVING_COURT_CODE" , RCT.NAME AS "TRANSFER_RECEIVING_COURT_NAME" FROM WARRANT_RETURNS WR, WARRANTS W, COURTS SCT, COURTS RCT WHERE WR.TO_TRANSFER = '1' AND WR.WARRANT_RETURN_DATE = TO_DATE(${param.failedDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND WR.WARRANT_ID = W.WARRANT_ID AND SCT.CODE = W.ISSUED_BY AND RCT.CODE = WR.ADMIN_COURT_CODE ) UNION ( SELECT 'CO Case Events' AS "TRANSFER_TYPE" , CCE.CO_NUMBER AS "TRANSFER_NUMBER" , CO.ADMIN_COURT_CODE AS "TRANSFER_SENDING_COURT_CODE" , SCT.NAME AS "TRANSFER_SENDING_COURT_NAME" , CCE.ADMIN_COURT_CODE AS "TRANSFER_RECEIVING_COURT_CODE" , RCT.NAME AS "TRANSFER_RECEIVING_COURT_NAME" FROM CO_CASE_EVENTS CCE, CONSOLIDATED_ORDERS CO, COURTS SCT, COURTS RCT WHERE CCE.TRANSFER_STATUS = '1' AND CCE.TRANSFER_DATE = TO_DATE(${param.failedDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND CCE.CO_NUMBER = CO.CO_NUMBER AND SCT.CODE = CO.ADMIN_COURT_CODE AND RCT.CODE = CCE.ADMIN_COURT_CODE ) UNION ( SELECT 'CAPS Events' AS "TRANSFER_TYPE" , AEV.AE_NUMBER AS "TRANSFER_NUMBER" , C.ADMIN_CRT_CODE AS "TRANSFER_SENDING_COURT_CODE" , SCT.NAME AS "TRANSFER_SENDING_COURT_NAME" , NULL AS "TRANSFER_RECEIVING_COURT_CODE" , NULL AS "TRANSFER_RECEIVING_COURT_NAME" FROM AE_EVENTS AEV, CASES C, AE_APPLICATIONS AEA, COURTS SCT WHERE AEV.PROCESS_STAGE IS NULL AND AEV.PROCESS_DATE = TO_DATE(${param.failedDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND AEV.AE_NUMBER = AEA.AE_NUMBER AND AEA.CASE_NUMBER = C.CASE_NUMBER AND SCT.CODE = C.ADMIN_CRT_CODE )
